title: Invoking an application to perform a service based on message content
abstract: Invoking an application to perform a service based on message content is disclosed, including: obtaining content from a message received at a device; extracting situation-feature information from the content; generating one or more application-entry objects based at least in part on the situation-feature information; presenting the one or more application-entry objects at the device; receiving an indication that an application-entry object among the one or more application- entry objects is to be activated; and in response to an activation of the application-entry object, invoking an application to perform a service corresponding to the application-entry object.
